name: boardstate
description: Local-first hybrid MTG battlefield companion rebuilt with layered gameplay systems.

scripts.android:prepare: npm run build && npm run android:sync-assets
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:gradle -- clean assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:gradle -- clean assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.android:build:all: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:gradle -- clean assembleDebug assembleRelease bundleRelease exportReleaseUploadCertificate
